Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__baseline", sum(CASE WHEN (up.applicability = true) THEN up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" ELSE bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" END * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__upgrade", sum((coalesce(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", 0) - coalesce(CASE WHEN (up.applicability = true) THEN up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" ELSE bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" END, 0)) * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__savings", sum(bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption__baseline", sum(CASE WHEN (up.applicability = true) THEN up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" ELSE bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" END * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption__upgrade", sum((coalesce(bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption", 0) - coalesce(CASE WHEN (up.applicability = true) THEN up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" ELSE bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" END, 0)) * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption__savings" 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs LEFT OUTER JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.upgrade = 1 AND up.applicability = true 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" IN ('CO', 'WY') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/8929419af24a8c47e080755a92e90b40e641a809bb76778212cfbae557487149/65d7d76f-ee33-4fea-9af7-da0a4e326540/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
